test.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import subprocess, json, shutil
root = Path('/Users/codex/Projects/gemini-mission-control-extension')
mid = 'scrutinyfoundationrerun'
mission_dir = Path.home()/'.gemini-mc'/'missions'/f'mis_{mid}'
if mission_dir.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(mission_dir)
subprocess.run([str(root/'scripts'/'scaffold-mission.sh'), mid, str(root)], check=True, cwd=root)
result = subprocess.run([str(root/'scripts'/'validate-state.sh'), str(mission_dir/'state.json')], cwd=root, capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout, end='')
print(result.stderr, end='')
print(json.dumps({'mission_dir': str(mission_dir), 'exit_code': result.returncode}))
raise SystemExit(result.returncode)
PY
